zh.lifeSummary: 當Alan Fenwick於1297年出生在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾時，他的父親Thomas de Fenwick31歲，母親Isabelle de Redeward26歲。他於1328年與Lady Katherine Baret在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德分維其可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1389年在他的家鄉享年92歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alan Fenwick于1297年出生在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾时，他的父亲Thomas de Fenwick31岁，母亲Isabelle de Redeward26岁。他于1328年与Lady Katherine Baret在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德分維其可结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1389年在他的家乡享年92岁。

nameMeanings.name: Fenwick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern) and Scottish: habitational name from either of two places in Northumberland or from one in Yorkshire, all of which are so named from Old English fenn ‘marsh, fen’ + wīc ‘outlying dairy farm’. There is also a place in Ayrshire, Scotland, which has the same name and origin. This last is the source of at least some early examples of the surname: Nicholaus Fynwyk was provost of Ayr in 1313, and Reginald de Fynwyk or Fynvyk appears as bailie and alderman of the same burgh in 1387 and 1401. The name is usually pronounced ‘Fennick’.

History: The name was brought over from England by several forebears, including George Fenwick (1603–56/7), a colonist from Brinkburn, Northumberland. He was one of the group of lords and gentlemen to whom the earl of Warwick, president of the Council for New England, granted forty leagues of territory west of the Narragansett River. George took up residence with his family at Saybrook, CT, in 1639. John Fenwick of Bynfield, Berkshire, England, established himself at Salem, NJ, in June 1675, the first Quaker settlement on the Delaware.

nameMeanings.name: Alan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

en.lifeSummary: When Alan Fenwick was born in 1297, in Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas de Fenwick, was 31 and his mother, Isabelle de Redeward, was 26. He married Lady Katherine Baret in 1328, in Fenwick, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1389, in his hometown, at the age of 92.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alan Fenwick est né en 1297, à Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas de Fenwick, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Isabelle de Redeward, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Lady Katherine Baret en 1328, à Fenwick, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1389, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 92 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alan Fenwick 1297 in Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas de Fenwick 31 und seine Mutter Isabelle de Redeward 26. Er hat 1328 in Fenwick, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom Lady Katherine Baret geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1389 im Alter von 92 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alan Fenwick è nato il nel 1297 nel Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas de Fenwick, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Isabelle de Redeward, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Lady Katherine Baret nel 1328, nel Fenwick, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1389, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 92 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Alan Fenwick(이)가 1297년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas de Fenwick(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabelle de Redeward(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1328년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 펜윅에서 Lady Katherine Baret(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1389년 그의 고향에서 92세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alan Fenwick nasceu em 1297, em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas de Fenwick, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Isabelle de Redeward, tinha 26 anos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alan Fenwick родился в 1297 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas de Fenwick было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Isabelle de Redeward, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Katherine Baret в 1328 г. в местности фенвикк, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1389 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 92 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alan Fenwick nació en 1297, en Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas de Fenwick, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Isabelle de Redeward, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Lady Katherine Baret en 1328, en Fenwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1389, en su pueblo, a la edad de 92 años.
